notes:
REGION JUDGMENT CALL (flagging per instructions, not resolving in this file): Vallejo is in Solano County, not one of the four counties (San Francisco, Marin, Alameda/Contra Costa, San Mateo/Santa Clara) that assets/regions.js's PB_CITY_REGION currently groups. The existing 'North Bay' bucket in regions.js only contains Marin cities (San Rafael, Novato). Geographically Vallejo sits at the top of San Pablo Bay near the Carquinez Strait and is commonly lumped into 'North Bay' in casual usage, but it's culturally/administratively distinct from Marin (Solano County, East Bay-adjacent, on I-80 not 101/37). A human should decide whether to fold Vallejo into the existing North Bay bucket, invent a new region key, or leave it unbucketed if a Vallejo page is built. Not changing assets/regions.js myself -- out of scope for this research file.

SCOPE: Pickleheads lists exactly 3 Vallejo locations / 9 courts (Mare Island courts 3 + Amador Park 2 + Glen Cove Park 4 = 9, checks out). Per the task's broader mandate (GVRD's own official listing is the primary source, not just Pickleheads), I found and confirmed 2 additional real, currently-operating public/membership venues Pickleheads does not yet list: GVRD Sports Gym (indoor, opened in the former Franklin Middle School building, not yet on Pickleheads as of this research) and a club at 124 Lincoln Rd E that pickleball aggregators still list under its old name 'Millennium Sports Club Vallejo' but which now operates as 'In-Shape Fitness Vallejo' (see that venue's own notes -- this is a rebrand, not two different clubs). Total: 5 venues, 16 courts.

NAMING TRAPS worth flagging for whoever reviews this: (1) 'Vallejo Mill Historical Park' -- already in this repo's assets/courts-data.json and assets/venues.json under Fremont -- is NOT in the city of Vallejo; it's an unrelated Alameda County park named after the same Peralta/Vallejo-era history. Confirmed it is not a Vallejo, CA venue and did not include it here. (2) Vallejo has a 'Glen Cove Park' (has the pickleball courts; GVRD's own site calls it 'Glen Cove School Park') that is NOT the same place as 'Glen Cove Waterfront Park' (a separate marina/waterfront park with no pickleball courts found). (3) 'Mare Island courts' / 'Mare Island Community Courts' at 746 Walnut Ave (has the pickleball courts, run by the Mare Island Company) is NOT the same place as 'Mare Island Sports Complex' at 785 Walnut Ave, which Yelp lists as CLOSED and which was a soccer-oriented facility -- easy to conflate since both are on Walnut Ave with similar names.

SOURCE QUALITY NOTE: pickleballvallejo.com (which looked at first like it might be a local club site worth treating as a primary community source) turned out to be a thin, apparently templated directory page that name-drops unrelated facilities (Moraga Country Club, Vacaville Pickleball, etc.) without populating real Vallejo-specific venue data -- not relied on for any fact in this file. 'Vallejo Benicia Pickleball Club' (vallejobeniciapick.wixsite.com) is a real community club site but its content is dated Oct-Nov 2019 and mixes in a Benicia (different city) location -- used only as weak corroboration that Glen Cove and Mare Island are known community play spots, not for any current fact.

EXCLUDED AS OUT OF SCOPE: Swimply lists ~10 private/backyard pickleball courts for hourly rent in the Vallejo area. These are individual homeowners' private courts, not public parks or an established club/gym, so they don't fit this site's venue model (public courts or a real membership club) -- excluded, not counted in notOnPickleheads since they were never a candidate venue type.

COORDINATES: Nominatim (OpenStreetMap) geocoding is used throughout since Google/Apple Maps pages could not be fetched directly (403s) and no numeric Google Maps cid could be confirmed for any venue -- googleMapsUrl is null for all 5 per the instruction to never fall back to a place_id or /maps/place/ form. Where Nominatim matched the exact street number, approxLocation is false; where only a street/road-segment level match was available, approxLocation is true and is noted per-venue. A human with access to Google Maps directly should re-pin these before publishing.

venues.name: Amador Park
venues.surface: Outdoor hard court/concrete, dedicated permanent lines and nets
venues.weather: Northern edge of the Bay near the Carquinez Strait -- a natural wind funnel, so afternoons here run noticeably breezier and gustier than more sheltered Bay Area courts; less coastal fog than San Francisco, warm-ish dry summers, mild wet winters.
venues.notes: Court count (2), outdoor, free, lights, and restrooms are consistent across Pickleheads, GVRD's own page, Global Pickleball Network, and Bounce -- high confidence. Address has a real discrepancy: GVRD's own 'Amador Park' page text resolves to '395 Amador Street' in this research, but that address is actually the Greater Vallejo Recreation District's own administrative office / North Vallejo Community Center (confirmed via multiple Yelp listings for 'GVRD Office' and 'Greater Vallejo Recreation District' at 395 Amador St, cross streets Fairgrounds Dr/Whitney Ave). Yelp's own 'Amador Park Tennis Courts' business listing uses '401 Amador St' -- used that as the address of record here since it's the more specific, court-specific listing, but the two addresses are one block apart at most and could refer to the same complex. Recommend a human confirm on the ground or via Street View which house number the actual court gate uses. Coordinates are an exact-address Nominatim geocode of 401 Amador St.

venues.name: Glen Cove Park
venues.surface: Outdoor asphalt, dedicated permanent lines and nets (resurfaced)
venues.hours: Not specified (GVRD's own listing notes the park is closed July 4th; no other hours published)
venues.weather: Northern edge of the Bay near the Carquinez Strait -- a natural wind funnel, so afternoons here run noticeably breezier and gustier than more sheltered Bay Area courts; less coastal fog than San Francisco, warm-ish dry summers, mild wet winters.
venues.notes: 4 courts, outdoor, free, restrooms/water/parking are consistent across GVRD's own page, Pickleheads, DailyPB, and prescottpickleball -- high confidence (one outlier: Bounce's synthesized answer said 2 courts, which contradicts every other source including GVRD itself; treated as a Bounce data error, not recorded as a conflict). GVRD's official name is 'Glen Cove School Park' (it sits next to / shares a lot with Glen Cove Elementary School); Pickleheads, DailyPB, and Visit Vallejo all just call it 'Glen Cove Park', which is used here as the primary name. LIGHTS CONFLICT: GVRD's own page explicitly states 'unlighted tennis (3) & pickleball (4) courts' -- taken as authoritative here (lights: false) since it's the primary government source -- but a couple of aggregator-synthesized answers described the courts as lit. That may be aggregator confusion with Amador Park's lighted tennis courts. ADDRESS CONFLICT: GVRD's own page gives '605 Glen Cove Pkwy'; Pickleheads, DailyPB, Bounce, and Pickleballify all independently say '501 Glen Cove Pkwy' instead. Investigated this: 501 Glen Cove Parkway is actually the address of Glen Cove Elementary School itself (confirmed via Trulia/GreatSchools/VCUSD), not the park -- likely several aggregators picked up the adjacent school's address by mistake since the park and school share a block. Went with GVRD's own '605' as authoritative. Do not confuse this venue with 'Glen Cove Waterfront Park' (a separate marina park nearby with no pickleball courts found). Coordinates are from OuterSpatial (a parks database), not a house-level geocode -- marked approximate; they do fall inside the plausible road-segment range an OSM/Nominatim lookup of Glen Cove Parkway returned, which is at least a sanity check.

venues.name: Mare Island Courts
venues.surface: Outdoor acrylic, dedicated permanent lines and nets (plus 1 additional court on-site shared between tennis and basketball, not counted in the pickleball total)
venues.hours: Daily 8am-8pm; CourtReserve reservation windows Mon-Fri 8:00am-8:00pm, Sat 7:00am-8:00pm, Sun 7:00am-8:00pm. Players with a reservation have priority; walk-ons may be asked to leave if someone with a booking arrives.
venues.weather: Northern edge of the Bay near the Carquinez Strait -- a natural wind funnel, so afternoons here run noticeably breezier and gustier than more sheltered Bay Area courts; less coastal fog than San Francisco, warm-ish dry summers, mild wet winters.
venues.notes: 3 dedicated pickleball courts (+1 shared tennis/basketball court) is consistent across Pickleheads and every third-party aggregator checked -- high confidence, best-corroborated Vallejo venue. Run by The Mare Island Company (a private master-developer/HOA-type entity for the Mare Island district, contact courts@mareislandco.com), not GVRD -- courts are nonetheless free and open to the public, just gated by an online reservation system (CourtReserve). Address 746 Walnut Ave is consistent across sources; it is on Walnut Avenue 'across from St. Peter's Chapel' (the historic naval chapel, itself at 1181 Walnut Ave). Do NOT confuse with 'Mare Island Sports Complex' at 785 Walnut Ave, a separate, unrelated facility that Yelp explicitly lists as CLOSED (it was soccer-field-oriented) -- easy to conflate given the shared street and similar naming; confirmed these are two different addresses/facilities. No exact house-number match was available via OSM/Nominatim for 746 Walnut Ave (only road segments), so lat/lon here is the nearest matched Walnut Ave road segment (the one tagged plain 'Vallejo, 94592' rather than the 'Mare Island Navy Yard (historical)' segments further north, which seemed like the better fit for a lower house number) -- flagged approximate; a human should get an exact pin. bookingUrl points to the Mare Island Company's explore page since CourtReserve itself requires an account/deep link to reach the specific facility.

venues.name: GVRD Sports Gym
venues.surface: Indoor gymnasium floor (converted former middle-school gym), portable court setup
venues.hours: Varies by season and program -- example schedule found for Sept 2025-Jan 2026: Mon 5-8pm (GVRD Program), Tue 8-10pm (Reservation Only), Wed 5-8pm (GVRD Program), Thu 8-10pm (Reservation Only), Fri 5-8pm (GVRD Program), Sat 7:30-8pm (Reservation Only), Sun 1-6pm (Open Basketball -- not pickleball-specific). Check gvrd.org/gvrd-sports-gym for the current schedule; GVRD's own Adult Pickleball League page shows past sessions cancelled, so standing drop-in availability should not be assumed.
venues.weather: Northern edge of the Bay near the Carquinez Strait -- a natural wind funnel, so afternoons here run noticeably breezier and gustier than more sheltered Bay Area courts; less coastal fog than San Francisco, warm-ish dry summers, mild wet winters. (Indoor venue, so less relevant here.)
venues.notes: NOT on Pickleheads (its city index only shows 3 outdoor locations totaling 9 courts) -- this appears to be a newer facility: GVRD leased the former Franklin Middle School building (VCUSD closed that school; sources disagree whether 2020 or 2023) and opened it as a public sports gym, per its own 'grand opening' event listing and an independent Vallejo Sun news article. 3 indoor pickleball courts with portable nets, confirmed via GVRD's own page and a secondary aggregator (tennispickleballcalifornia.com) -- meets the two-independent-source bar for confirmed:true, but pricing and a stable weekly pickleball-specific schedule were not confirmed by any source (the schedule found is a dated Sept 2025-Jan 2026 example, and GVRD's own league page shows cancelled sessions), so treat hours/price here as a starting point for a phone call, not a settled fact. Address 501 Starr Ave geocodes exactly via OSM/Nominatim, though OSM's own point-of-interest tag at that address is a different, unrelated tenant name ('Rising Star SPED Academy') -- consistent with a multi-tenant former school building; the street-address-level coordinate match itself is solid.

venues.name: In-Shape Fitness Vallejo
venues.surface: Outdoor hard/concrete court -- sources describe both pickleball and tennis offered at this address but don't specify whether they're dedicated pickleball courts or tennis courts with pickleball lines overlaid
venues.netType: Not specified (an older aggregator listing under this club's previous name said 'bring your own net'; not corroborated by the club's own current site, so not treated as confirmed)
venues.price: Membership required; day passes available at the door
venues.hours: Club hours: Mon-Thu 4:00am-11:00pm, Fri 4:00am-10:00pm, Sat-Sun 6:00am-8:00pm (general club hours; not confirmed as pickleball-court-specific hours)
venues.weather: Northern edge of the Bay near the Carquinez Strait -- a natural wind funnel, so afternoons here run noticeably breezier and gustier than more sheltered Bay Area courts; less coastal fog than San Francisco, warm-ish dry summers, mild wet winters.
venues.notes: IMPORTANT REBRAND, not two clubs: every pickleball-specific aggregator (Bounce, Pickleballify, MyOPL) still lists this venue under its former name 'Millennium Sports Club Vallejo', and that exact business's Yelp listing is explicitly marked 'CLOSED - Updated March 2026'. Taken alone, that would mean excluding this as defunct. But the same street address (124 Lincoln Rd E / 124 E Lincoln Rd, Vallejo, CA 94591) is now an active, currently-operating 'In-Shape Fitness' location per: In-Shape's own official site (with its own hours, phone number (707) 244-8060, and a dedicated pickleball page), a separate, currently-active Yelp listing ('IN-SHAPE FITNESS', updated June 2026, 225 reviews, not marked closed), and playpickleball.com's 'In-Shape Vallejo' listing. Court count (4) and lights match what the old Millennium listings reported, consistent with the same physical courts continuing under new ownership/branding rather than being rebuilt. Treated this as a real, currently-operating venue under its current name (In-Shape Fitness Vallejo) and did not use the stale 'Millennium Sports Club' name, but flagging clearly since this is exactly the kind of stale-name trap that could cause a future researcher to either wrongly exclude this venue (trusting the old Yelp 'closed' tag) or wrongly list it twice under both names. A human should ideally call ahead ((707) 244-8060) to verify pickleball is still offered day-to-day before this goes live, since no source here is pickleball-specific and current beyond In-Shape's own general amenities page.
